name: LightspeedConnector
description: Connects to the Lightspeed Retail (R-Series POS) REST API to read and manage customers, items, sales, inventory, categories, vendors, employees, and shops. Uses OAuth 2.0 Authorization Code with refresh-on-401 and honors Lightspeed's leaky-bucket rate limit (X-LS-API-Bucket-Level).

install_fields.label: OAuth Client ID
install_fields.help: From the Lightspeed Developer Portal -> API. Create an OAuth client and copy the Client ID here.

install_fields.label: OAuth Client Secret
install_fields.help: From the Lightspeed Developer Portal -> API. Stored encrypted by Shielva.

install_fields.label: Lightspeed Account ID
install_fields.help: Your Lightspeed Retail account ID (numeric) - found under Settings -> Account in the Lightspeed Retail dashboard. Used as a URL segment on every API call.

install_fields.label: OAuth Scopes
install_fields.help: Space-separated Lightspeed scopes. 'employee:all' grants full read/write; 'employee:register' is required for sale + register operations.

install_fields.label: OAuth Authorization URL
install_fields.help: Lightspeed OAuth2 authorization endpoint. Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: OAuth Token URL
install_fields.help: Lightspeed OAuth2 token endpoint (exchange + refresh). Leave blank to use the default.

install_fields.label: OAuth Redirect URI
install_fields.help: OAuth callback URL configured in the Lightspeed Developer Portal.

install_fields.label: Rate Limit (requests/min)
install_fields.help: Approximate sustainable Lightspeed throughput. The connector also enforces Lightspeed's leaky-bucket header (X-LS-API-Bucket-Level) at runtime.

apis.name: Install Connector
apis.description: Validates client_id and client_secret and marks the connector installed. Call before OAuth authorization.

apis.name: Authorize (OAuth Code Exchange)
apis.description: Exchanges an OAuth2 authorization code for access and refresh tokens.

apis.name: Health Check
apis.description: Verifies Lightspeed Retail API connectivity by probing /Account.json.

apis.name: Get Account
apis.description: Returns the raw Lightspeed Account envelope for the configured account_id.

apis.name: List Customers
apis.description: List Lightspeed customers, optionally filtered by lastName.

apis.name: Get Customer
apis.description: Fetch a single customer by ID.

apis.name: Create Customer
apis.description: Create a new customer record. Accepts a raw Contact sub-doc, or convenience email/phone arguments.

apis.name: List Items
apis.description: List Lightspeed Retail items, optionally filtered by description (search) or category.

apis.name: Get Item
apis.description: Fetch a single Lightspeed item by ID.

apis.name: Create Item
apis.description: Create a new Lightspeed Retail item. Builds the Prices sub-envelope from default_price.

apis.name: Update Item
apis.description: Update an existing Lightspeed item with the given fields dict (PUT semantics).

apis.name: List Sales
apis.description: List sales with optional completed/date/customer filters. Date filters use Lightspeed's '>,<,><' operators on createTime.

apis.name: Get Sale
apis.description: Fetch a single sale by ID.

apis.name: Create Sale
apis.description: POST /Sale.json - create a new sale envelope. Accepts a raw Lightspeed Sale body.

apis.name: List Inventory
apis.description: Per-shop inventory rows for items via /ItemShop.json.

apis.name: List Categories
apis.description: List item categories.

apis.name: List Vendors
apis.description: List Lightspeed vendors.

apis.name: List Employees
apis.description: List Lightspeed employees.

apis.name: List Shops
apis.description: List configured Lightspeed shops/locations.

apis.name: Sync Items
apis.description: Sync Lightspeed Retail items into the Shielva knowledge base. Uses incremental timeStamp filter when a checkpoint exists.
